design_principles: Content is King: The UI should be almost invisible, pure white, and high-contrast, letting the colorful collectibles stand out.
Minimal Colors: Strictly monochrome (Black, White, Greys) with Electric Yellow reserved exclusively for the 'Yellow Pecora' mascot, matches, and primary CTAs.
Negative Space: Generous padding (p-6 to p-12) to create a premium, uncrowded feeling for collectors.
Optical Alignment: Maintain crisp, sharp layouts with subtle 1px borders instead of heavy shadows.

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100
elements: Barra di ricerca con icona lente (Search in lucide-react)

yellow_pecora_banner.style: bg-yellow-400 rounded-2xl p-8 sm:p-12 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between overflow-hidden relative
yellow_pecora_banner.content: Mostra 'Oggetto del Giorno' e 'Scambi Consigliati'. Usa font bold e colori ad alto contrasto (Nero su Giallo). Includi l'immagine della mascotte.

item_card.image_style: object-cover w-full h-full transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105
item_card.content: Nome oggetto, Categoria/Tag (badge grigio), e Avatar del proprietario in basso.

explore_sidebar.style: w-full md:w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-gray-100 pr-6 hidden md:block
explore_sidebar.filters: Checkboxes per Categoria, Sottocategoria, Tipo transazione (Scambio, Vendita). Su mobile, converte in un Drawer/Sheet.

object_detail.gallery: Immagine grande a sinistra, aspect-square, bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl object-cover
object_detail.info_panel: A destra. Badge 'Match Perfetto!' (bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800) se applicabile. Titolo grande, tags, valore stimato.
object_detail.ctas: Pulsante primario 'Proponi Scambio' (Massiccio, bg-black text-white o bg-yellow-400 text-black). Pulsanti secondari 'Compra' e 'Salva/Desideri'.

profile_tabs.style: Usa Shadcn Tabs. Header con grande Avatar, Nome, Livello Collezionista e icone Badge circolari.
profile_tabs.tabs: Collezioni Ufficiali (con progress bar %), Doppioni, Scambiabili, In Vendita, Lista Desideri

upload_modal.style: Usa Shadcn Dialog per il modale. Contenuto diviso in step per la simulazione AI.
upload_modal.drag_drop: Area tratteggiata (border-dashed border-2 border-gray-200 rounded-2xl p-12 text-center).
upload_modal.ai_simulation: Testo 'L\'AI ha riconosciuto l\'oggetto!'. Input fields pre-compilati in sola lettura (bg-gray-50 text-gray-500) per Nome, Categoria e Tag. Lascia editabili Condizione e Note.

mascot.description: Yellow balloon dog serving as a playful yellow mascot proxy for the banner.

technical_instructions.ui_library: Shadcn UI (Tabs, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Button, Input, Badge).
technical_instructions.icons: lucide-react (Search, Upload, User, Star, Shield, ArrowRight).
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-button', data-testid='propose-trade-btn').
technical_instructions.mock_data: Generate a robust set of mock data in a dedicated file (e.g., src/data/mockData.js) containing Users, Items, Collections, and Tags to populate the components dynamically.
technical_instructions.animations: Use Tailwind CSS transitions for hovers and state changes. Focus on a lightweight, snappy feel.
technical_instructions.mobile_first: Ensure all grids collapse to 1 column on mobile. Use hidden/block classes to manage sidebars, ensuring the explore view is usable on small screens.
